segments.purpose: Game code + data: init, title screen, input, display lists
Game code + data: game engine, AI, terrain, sound
Game code + data: rendering, tables, level data

476C.name: set_viewport_offset
476C.comment: Add offset to viewport pointers — configures draw region

4B39.name: clear_hud_line
4B39.comment: Clear 14 bytes of HUD text buffer at $32B6

52C0.name: memzero
52C0.comment: Zero-fill memory block — X=count, dest in $CB/$CC

52E7.name: level_init
52E7.comment: Level init — terrain seed, difficulty params, reset enemy/pilot state

5997.name: build_screen_table
5997.comment: Build screen line address table — 45 ANTIC mode D rows, 96-byte stride

5AAE.name: pixel_shift_index
5AAE.comment: Compute pixel bit-shift index for ANTIC mode D rendering

5DE4.name: patch_display_list
5DE4.comment: Update display list LMS addresses for scroll offset

5F75.name: random_select
5F75.comment: Weighted random select — reads POKEY RANDOM, selects from table

622F.name: sound_play_effect
622F.comment: Play sound effect — set frequency/control for effect ID

68BF.name: sound_engine_update
68BF.comment: Sound engine tick — process sound effect queue

7B0A.name: build_line_table
7B0A.comment: Build rendering line table for terrain perspective

7B42.name: setup_gameplay_display
7B42.comment: Configure display list and screen memory for gameplay mode

7B4A.name: enable_display
7B4A.comment: Turn on DMA (SDMCTL) and enable DLI (NMIEN)

7C1C.name: mirror_charset
7C1C.comment: Mirror charset horizontally for HUD right-side text

7C80.name: game_init
7C80.comment: Full game state init — variables, position, fuel, lives, shield

7CD7.name: memcpy_block
7CD7.comment: Block memory copy — src $B8, dest ($C2), len $C4/$C5

7D9C.name: wait_n_frames
7D9C.comment: Wait N frames (count in A) synced to VBI counter $0609

82AA.name: vbi_deferred
82AA.comment: Deferred VBI — game state updates, collision checks

83F8.name: update_pmg_data
83F8.comment: Update player-missile shape data in PMG memory

843C.name: terrain_init
843C.comment: Fractal terrain init — fills height buffer, starts midpoint displacement

84C4.name: terrain_check_neighbors
84C4.comment: L-shaped neighbor check — returns negative if all unresolved

84E6.name: terrain_subdivide
84E6.comment: Terrain midpoint displacement step — 4 cardinal neighbors

8526.name: terrain_push_seed
8526.comment: Push current seed to recursion stack, increment depth

90BD.name: sound_init
90BD.comment: Sound system init — clear all POKEY channels

9290.name: queue_push
9290.comment: Command queue push — circular buffer at $071B, 32 slots

92AA.name: entity_swap
92AA.comment: Entity array management — swap/deactivate game objects

94AA.name: queue_push_flagged
94AA.comment: Queue push with bit 7 set — flagged event variant

94B1.name: entity_load_state
94B1.comment: Load entity state block from ROM tables into work area

9E8C.name: transform_vertex
9E8C.comment: 3D vertex transform — rotation + translation through camera matrix

A0DB.name: compute_screen_offset
A0DB.comment: Screen buffer offsets for terrain columns from viewer position

A157.name: project_x
A157.comment: 3D X coordinate to screen column — perspective division

A356.name: terrain_render
A356.comment: Main terrain rendering — iterate visible columns, transform + fill

A690.name: detect_pilot
A690.comment: Scan terrain surface for downed pilot — check pilot_map vs viewer

A754.name: plot_sprite_pixel
A754.comment: Plot masked sprite pixel to frame buffer with OR/AND blend

AD6C.name: load_camera
AD6C.comment: Copy camera pos/orientation to transform workspace

AF32.name: fill_column_fast
AF32.comment: Fast vertical column fill — unrolled store sequence

B24D.name: rasterize_edge
B24D.comment: Terrain edge draw — Bresenham-style line between projected vertices

B418.name: fill_terrain_column
B418.comment: Fill terrain column from edge to bottom with ground color

3C00.name: game_start
3C00.comment: Main entry — hardware init, VBI/IRQ setup, title screen

840A.name: vbi_title_screen
840A.comment: Title screen VBI — attract mode, color cycling

4940.name: irq_handler
4940.comment: Custom IRQ — keyboard via KBCODE, IRQEN management

8059.name: gameplay_vbi
8059.comment: Gameplay VBI — colors, PMG, DMA, rendering dispatch

4CF1.name: dli_dispatch
4CF1.comment: DLI dispatcher — indexes jump table by stage counter $C8

4DD6.name: dli_jump_table
4DD6.comment: DLI stage handler address table (8 entries, lo/hi pairs)

790A.name: set_pmg_positions
790A.comment: Write PMG horizontal positions and sizes from tables

8530.name: read_joystick
8530.comment: Read joystick port and decode direction/fire

91E7.name: sound_set_channel
91E7.comment: Set individual POKEY channel frequency and control

6B9E.name: dat_6B9E
6B9E.comment: Terrain rendering LUTs — perspective transform, height-to-screen

610B.name: dli_colors_a
610B.comment: DLI: load color regs from shadow, set PRIOR=$94

61CF.name: dli_colors_c
61CF.comment: DLI: set PRIOR, load colors for cockpit section

0080.name: zp_ptr_lo
0080.comment: General pointer lo — screen row addr during pixel write, direction table during transform

0082.name: zp_column_x
0082.comment: Current column X position — saved by STX $82 in rasterize inner loop

0084.name: zp_depth_accum
0084.comment: Depth interpolation accumulator — averaged with edge samples in rasterize loop

0085.name: zp_proj_y_hi
0085.comment: Projected Y high byte (from project_x Y phase)

0086.name: zp_color_shade
0086.comment: Color/shade interpolation value — terrain color gradient during edge walk

0088.name: zp_grid_x
0088.comment: Terrain grid X component — combined with $8A for heightmap index

008A.name: zp_grid_row
008A.comment: Terrain grid row — upper nibble used for height buffer indexing

008B.name: zp_cam_alt_lo
008B.comment: Camera altitude lo — subtracted from terrain height in transform_vertex

0092.name: zp_dir_quadrant
0092.comment: Direction quadrant selector — bits 7-6 choose transform variant in transform_vertex

0095.name: zp_edge_x_arr
0095.comment: Edge sample X position array (indexed by Y) — terrain edge column positions

0096.name: zp_edge_x_next
0096.comment: Next-level subdivided X position (indexed by Y) — output of midpoint bisection

0097.name: zp_blend_row
0097.comment: Row counter for pixel blend loop in fill_column_fast phase 3

0098.name: zp_frac_depth
0098.comment: Fractal recursion depth — terrain subdivision stack pointer

0099.name: zp_frac_prev_depth
0099.comment: Previous fractal depth — compared against $98 to detect subdivision progress

009A.name: zp_frac_delta_x
009A.comment: Fractal delta X — step direction for terrain subdivision (+1/-1/+16/-16)

009B.name: zp_frac_delta_y
009B.comment: Fractal delta Y — perpendicular step for terrain subdivision

009C.name: zp_frac_seed_pos
009C.comment: Current seed position in terrain height buffer

009F.name: zp_norm_shift
009F.comment: Normalization shift count — saved by project_x, passed to/from div16

00A0.name: zp_disp_x_lo
00A0.comment: X displacement vector lo — camera heading projected to grid X step

00A2.name: zp_disp_z_lo
00A2.comment: Z displacement vector lo — camera heading projected to grid Z step

00A8.name: zp_saved_x
00A8.comment: Saved X register — used by terrain_render to preserve state across calls

00AD.name: zp_mul_plier
00AD.comment: Multiply multiplier (8-bit input, also used as shift register)

00AE.name: zp_mul_sign
00AE.comment: Multiply sign save — bit 7 = negate result after unsigned multiply

00B0.name: zp_div_divisor_hi
00B0.comment: Division divisor hi — BIT $B0 tests bit 6 for normalization

00B5.name: zp_terrain_idx
00B5.comment: Terrain index composite — combined grid X/row for heightmap lookup

00B6.name: zp_temp
00B6.comment: Temp — Y save during pixel write, partial result during transform

00B7.name: zp_grid_row_accum
00B7.comment: Terrain grid row accumulator — accumulated row offset during vertex walk

00B8.name: zp_random_work
00B8.comment: Random perturbation workspace — used in terrain fractal generation

00BC.name: zp_screen_ptr_lo
00BC.comment: Screen pointer lo — heavy write, used in rendering copy loops

00BE.name: zp_screen_ptr2_lo
00BE.comment: Secondary screen pointer lo — used in double-buffer/copy operations

00C0.name: zp_color_work
00C0.comment: DLI/color workspace — R=20 W=18, used in color register programming

00C2.name: zp_memcpy_dst_lo
00C2.comment: Memcpy destination ptr lo — most-written ZP pair, used by memcpy_block

00E1.name: zp_dli_vec_lo
00E1.comment: DLI indirect jump vector lo — loaded from dli_jump_table, jumped through

00E3.name: zp_depth_arr
00E3.comment: Depth value array (indexed by Y) — terrain depth at each edge sample point

00E4.name: zp_depth_interp
00E4.comment: Interpolated depth output (indexed by Y) — result of midpoint averaging

0603.name: game_ready_flag
0603.comment: Game ready/started flag — only written #$00, read by 3 procs

0604.name: game_active_flag
0604.comment: Game active flag — only written #$01, read by 3 procs

0605.name: game_phase_timer
0605.comment: Slow game phase timer — increments ~2 per 100 frames

0609.name: frame_counter
0609.comment: Frame counter — incremented by VBI, used by wait_n_frames for sync

060C.name: terrain_scroll_accum
060C.comment: Terrain scroll accumulator — smooth flight distance, ADC/SBC in terrain_render

060F.name: terrain_scroll_rate
060F.comment: Terrain scroll rate — speed-dependent, SBC in terrain_render for distance calc

061B.name: game_timer
061B.comment: Game timer — R=9 W=4, frequently read counter

061C.name: game_mode
061C.comment: Game mode / level state — R=15 W=2, most-read state variable

0622.name: slow_timer
0622.comment: Slow timer — incremented by VBI title screen handler

0629.name: game_event_flag
0629.comment: Game event flag — R=6 W=2, state_var, triggers game events

0636.name: dirty_flag
0636.comment: Changed/dirty flag — only written #$FF, read once (triggers redraw)

0638.name: score_lo
0638.comment: Score low byte — BCD, ADC with #$50 (500 points per pilot)

0639.name: score_hi
0639.comment: Score high byte — BCD, ADC with #$01/#$02

063B.name: lives_or_fuel
063B.comment: Lives or fuel counter — value 02 at runtime

063F.name: score_digit
063F.comment: BCD score/lives digit — BCD increment at $656B

0640.name: display_enabled
0640.comment: Display enabled flag — only written #$01, read by 3 procs

0641.name: terrain_detail
0641.comment: Terrain distance/detail level — written by terrain_render based on camera distance

0643.name: terrain_vis_flag
0643.comment: Terrain visibility flag — set #$80 when terrain close, $00 when far

0654.name: slot_available
0654.comment: Entity slot available flag — only written #$00, read by 4 procs

065F.name: ent_type
065F.comment: Entity attribute table [0]: type/state — 14 entries, most accessed (24 ops, 15 procs)

066D.name: ent_flags
066D.comment: Entity attribute table [1]: flags — low nibble = entity subtype

067B.name: ent_state
067B.comment: Entity attribute table [2]: secondary state (14 ops, 9 procs)

0707.name: ent_active_flags
0707.comment: Entity active bitmap — 6 readers scan this, bits = entity type mask

071B.name: cmd_queue_data
071B.comment: Command queue data — 32 slots, circular buffer, written by queue_push (25 writers)

073B.name: cmd_queue_ptr
073B.comment: Command queue head/tail — most-accessed address in game (R=26, W=27)

0751.name: row_addr_lo_blend
0751.comment: Screen row address table lo — for pixel blend in fill_column_fast phase 3

07A7.name: row_addr_hi_blend
07A7.comment: Screen row address table hi — paired with $0751 for indirect screen access

289B.name: cam_heading_lo
289B.comment: Camera heading angle lo — 16-bit, small changes = smooth turning

289D.name: cam_pitch_lo
289D.comment: Camera pitch angle lo — 16-bit, controls up/down view

28A0.name: cam_altitude
28A0.comment: Camera altitude — height above terrain, value ~$2D during flight

28A4.name: flight_param
28A4.comment: Flight parameter — R=11 W=7, frequently read, affects terrain render

28A5.name: difficulty_level
28A5.comment: Difficulty/level parameter — R=14 W=1, near-constant (written once at level init)

28A9.name: terrain_near_dist
28A9.comment: Nearest terrain distance — computed per frame, controls detail level $0641

28AC.name: viewport_state
28AC.comment: Viewport state — R=11 W=11, rendering state counter

2843.name: prev_detail_level
2843.comment: Previous terrain detail level — compared with $0641 to detect changes

2844.name: render_state_flag
2844.comment: Rendering state flag — updated after terrain render

2882.name: camera_view_param
2882.comment: Camera view parameter — R=9 W=2, affects terrain render initial setup

2887.name: render_toggle
2887.comment: Rendering state toggle — values $00/$01, alternates per frame

2608.name: zbuf_columns
2608.comment: Per-column Z-buffer — 212 entries, depth of nearest terrain at each screen column

2634.name: zbuf_sentinel_a
2634.comment: Z-buffer sentinel area A — initialized with $67 each frame for occlusion

2648.name: zbuf_sentinel_b
2648.comment: Z-buffer sentinel area B — initialized with $6B, 4 sub-arrays of 33 bytes

2572.name: work_proj_x_lo
2572.comment: Working projected X lo — copied from vertex array for current edge pair

25EA.name: work_height
25EA.comment: Working terrain height — for current edge pair

2270.name: vtx_grid_idx
2270.comment: Vertex terrain grid index — 45 entries, maps vertex to heightmap position

229D.name: vtx_cam_x_lo
229D.comment: Vertex camera-space X lo — 45 entries, accumulated from direction deltas

22F9.name: vtx_cam_z_lo
22F9.comment: Vertex camera-space Z lo — 45 entries, used as divisor in perspective projection

2355.name: vtx_height_lo
2355.comment: Vertex scaled height lo — 45 entries, terrain height after altitude subtract + shift

23AF.name: vtx_raw_height
23AF.comment: Vertex raw terrain height — 45 entries, read from $0900 heightmap

23DC.name: vtx_screen_x_lo
23DC.comment: Vertex projected screen X lo — 45 entries, output of project_x X phase

2409.name: vtx_screen_x_hi
2409.comment: Vertex projected screen X hi — 45 entries

2436.name: vtx_screen_y_lo
2436.comment: Vertex projected screen Y lo — 45 entries, output of project_x Y phase

2463.name: vtx_screen_y_hi
2463.comment: Vertex projected screen Y hi — 45 entries

28EC.name: row_addr_lo_render
28EC.comment: Scanline address lo table — 48 entries, maps depth index to screen row address

291C.name: row_addr_hi_render
291C.comment: Scanline address hi table — 48 entries, paired with $28EC

27E9.name: saved_column_x
27E9.comment: Saved column X — STX at fill_terrain_column entry, LDX at exit

2728.name: edge_iter_y_save
2728.comment: Edge iteration Y save — STY/LDY in terrain_render edge loop

28F6.name: current_vtx_idx
28F6.comment: Current vertex index — STX $28F6 in terrain_render, used for edge pair tracking

2708.name: horizon_profile
2708.comment: Horizon height profile — 32 entries, vertical offset per distance band

28D0.name: height_delta_tab
28D0.comment: Height delta table — 32 entries, terrain height differences for perspective

BC00.name: pix_color_mask
BC00.comment: Pixel color mask table — 256 entries, ORA mask for plotting pixel at column X

BD00.name: pix_byte_offset
BD00.comment: Pixel byte offset table — 212 entries, byte offset within scanline (rebuilt per frame)

BE00.name: pix_blend_cont
BE00.comment: Pixel blend continuation table — maps byte → next blend mask for ground fill

BF00.name: pix_blend_merge
BF00.comment: Pixel blend merge table — additional bits to OR for dithered fill transitions
